# Concepts

## CLI-first knowledge store

Wikiwiki stores repo knowledge as validated JSONL records and renders deterministic Markdown pages.

The MVP keeps the source of truth in .wikiwiki/records and treats wiki/ as generated output.

Files: `src/core/store.ts`, `src/core/renderer.ts`

Tags: `mvp`, `architecture`

Record: `concept_650e0409-9414-4667-8b40-f36c406a1cb0` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high

## Spin heuristics

The spin command turns git working tree changes into structured update suggestions without AI summarization.

The MVP reads git status and diff stats, groups changed files by simple path patterns, and returns JSON that an external agent can interpret.

Files: `src/cli/commands/spin.ts`, `src/core/git.ts`

Tags: `git`, `cli`

Record: `concept_26478291-0b15-4363-b661-436bab183226` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high
